plan.rationale: novel territory; record for later consolidation

thought.text:
The puzzle's conclusion seems too good to be true - I've heard of penguins being flightless, but here it says they can fly.

Pattern recognition: This puzzle follows a classic logical fallacy pattern, where a general statement (all birds can fly) is applied to a specific case (penguins), despite the fact that not all birds are capable of flight.
